reason: Tests require rewrite, not instruction. The remaining tier_a failures are all test-level issues: (1) tests assert on gold-specific function names 'extractTeamIdFromApiKeyBreakdown'/'resolveEntityDisplay' and exact test strings, (2) 4/9 tests are pure text-matching with no code execution, (3) solution_uniqueness_guard fails because tests enforce exact gold implementation, (4) anti_cheating_measures fails because /solution/ is copied into the container. These are not addressable via instruction.md changes. The instruction was successfully reconciled for no_solution_leakage and instruction_no_hint_leakage, which now pass.
